name: Text
description: Typography component for body text, headings, labels, notation, action text, code text, and display styles.
import: import { Text, Display1, Display2, Display3, H1, H2, H3, H4, Label, TextNotation, TextAction } from "@salt-ds/core";

as.description: Polymorphic element override for semantic markup

maxRows.description: Line clamp count for truncation with ellipsis

styleAs.description: Applies a different Salt text style while preserving rendered element semantics

variant.description: Deprecated legacy color prop; use `color` instead

slots.children: Text content and inline emphasis elements

aria: Use heading semantics (H1..H4 or `as` prop) to preserve navigable document structure
Do not skip heading levels when composing page hierarchy
When using `maxRows` truncation, provide a mechanism to access full text (for example tooltip or expand interaction)
